crons.description: Keepalive ping — confirm Hanna is operational
crons.action: Post status check to messaging channel

crons.description: Morning anime trend scan — check Google Trends for top anime topics
crons.action: Run trends scan, generate article draft if trending topic found

crons.description: Monday asset drop — generate one production anime asset
crons.action: Create character/scene asset based on trending anime or community request

crons.description: Wed/Sat blog publish — push queued articles to production
crons.action: Review and publish queued blog drafts

crons.description: Friday community digest — weekly roundup of studio activity
crons.action: Generate and post weekly community digest
